resources: Hold the device in front of your face and look at the screen Scanning Back Camera error Camera permission denied Please allow camera access for this app in Android Settings An existing capture is already in progress You cannot use iProov unless you grant consent Device is not supported Invalid iProov options Before calling IProov.launch(), you should register a listener with IProov.registerListener() Application is in multi-window mode Network error Device is not supported Server error A Session cannot be started twice Unexpected error Try again //old UFCs - remove Move your face farther from the screen Move your face closer to the screen Keep your face in the oval Remove sunglasses Move somewhere darker Move somewhere brighter Keep still Try again //new UFCs - keep System error. Make sure your face is well lit and free from glare. Align your face in the oval and then try to keep still. System timeout. Make sure your whole face is visible and remove any accessories that might cover your face. Ensure only one person is visible. Remove your eyewear. Try a different device. Transaction could not be completed. Move to a different location with a neutral background. Make sure your eyes are open. Try a different device. Please restart your device and try again. Align your face in the oval and then try to keep still. Please try again. Transaction could not be completed. Please try again. en Assessing genuine presence… Assessing liveness… Confirming identity… Creating identity… Finding face… Identifying face… Loading… Streaming… Put your face in the oval Get ready… Hold still Scan completed Move down Move up Move right Move left Go somewhere shadier Too close Move closer Close Secured by iProov
